headlines.headline: NBA championship and Finals MVP odds: Knicks, Brunson new favorites
headlines.description: The New York Knicks are now the championship favorites after their come-from-behind road victory over San Antonio in Game 1.

headlines.headline: Houston Rockets unveil new uniforms, updated logo
headlines.description: Houston's new uniforms call back to the "ketchup and mustard" era and pay tribute to the city's identity as a hub of the space program.

headlines.headline: Two fans get lifetime bans over selfie quest at Gm.1 of NBA Finals
headlines.description: Two fans involved in a selfie-seeking incident during Game 1 of the NBA Finals on Wednesday night have been given lifetime bans from all NBA arenas, a league spokesperson said Thursday.

headlines.headline: All-time sweeps at the NBA Finals
headlines.description: Though fans love hard-fought battles between teams, sweeps can speed up the festivities. Check out notable sweeps from NBA Finals history.

headlines.headline: Sources: Packers, WR Christian Watson reach $110.5M extension
headlines.description: Wide receiver Christian Watson and the Packers reached agreement Thursday on a four-year, $110.5 million contract extension that includes a $31 million signing bonus, sources told ESPN's Adam Schefter.

headlines.headline: Lions 2026 fifth-round pick Kendrick Law tears ACL in practice
headlines.description: Lions rookie wide receiver Kendrick Law suffered a torn ACL during Tuesday's OTA practice in a noncontact drill.

headlines.headline: Mike Clay's fantasy football dynasty and rookie rankings

headlines.headline: Wild's Marcus Foligno wins King Clancy for leadership, service
headlines.description: Marcus Foligno has received this season's King Clancy Memorial Trophy for leadership and service, joining his brother and Wild teammate Nick as winners of the award.

headlines.headline: Frederik Andersen gets coach's backing as save numbers slide
headlines.description: The Hurricanes remain confident in goalie Frederik Andersen despite his numbers declining dramatically over the past six games.

headlines.headline: PWHL's Boston Fleet hire Francois Methot as head coach
headlines.description: The Boston Fleet announced on Thursday the hiring of Francois Methot as their head coach, citing his track record of developing women and men's players over the past decade.

headlines.headline: Stanley Cup playoffs daily: Previews, stats, schedule, bracket
headlines.description: Here are the top players and trends to know with the Golden Knights up 1-0 on the Hurricanes.

headlines.headline: Lightning coach Jon Cooper wins Jack Adams after 14 seasons
headlines.description: After 14 seasons coaching the Lightning, including two Stanley Cups, Jon Cooper has won the Jack Adams Award as NHL coach of the year.

headlines.headline: Hurricanes seek more scoring from top line in Stanley Cup Final
headlines.description: The Hurricanes acknowledged they need more scoring production out of their top line in order to win the Stanley Cup.
